company: TouchNet Information Systems (A Global Payments Company)
details: Led cloud migration using AWS Migration Hub & Google Data Transfer Service.
Deployed AI/ML workloads on Vertex AI and Kubeflow with automated pipelines.
Built GPU-based HPC clusters (NVIDIA DGX, GKE nodes, Cisco UCS).
Implemented observability with SLOs/SLIs, error budgets & real-time dashboards.
Automated infra using Python, Terraform, and Ansible to reduce manual toil.
Engineered fault-tolerant Kubernetes + GCP architectures for ML workloads.
Maintained CI/CD pipelines via Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins.
Integrated ChatOps automation with Python and GCP Functions.
Designed ETL pipelines in Azure Data Factory for SQL, APIs & Blob Storage.
Drove cloud governance, cost optimization, and team enablement.
